citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Ethical design, at all stages of the design process, considers the values of all stakeholders and upholds the principles of fairness, transparency, explainability, accountability, respect for privacy, and adherence to societal values.
